EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISpatialReferenceFactory4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that create lists of coordinate systems.

[Guid("D383F512-5377-4DD6-8FCD-5BF05203577D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISpatialReferenceFactory4 : ISpatialReferenceFactory3, ISpatialReferenceFactory2, ISpatialReferenceFactory

IGeoTransformationOperationSet GeoTransformationDefaults { get; }

CreateFromAreaName(string, esriCoordinateSystemFilter)

Creates a coordinate system from the human-readable 'area name' of the coordinate system.

areaName string
typeFilter esriCoordinateSystemFilter

GetAreaNames(esriCoordinateSystemFilter, string, bool, bool)

Returns a set of predefined coordinate system names, and optionally the coordinate systems themselves.

IPropertySet GetAreaNames(esriCoordinateSystemFilter typeFilter, string nameFilter, bool returnCategorizedNames, bool hydrateSR)

Parameters

typeFilter esriCoordinateSystemFilter
nameFilter string
returnCategorizedNames bool
hydrateSR bool

Returns

IPropertySet
